name: sci-research
description: Three independent multi-agent news pipelines plus a project-scoped Codex runtime setup. Pipeline C provides daily news intelligence; Pipeline E uses high-freedom company and executive reputation scanning with low, medium, and high verification.

interface.shortDescription: Daily news intelligence, branded briefings, and reputation monitoring
interface.longDescription: Three independent pipelines: daily-news-intelligence (dated single-country briefing with a high-freedom authoritative-media Scanner and editorial Verifier), daily-briefing (multi-country branded SPD Bank Word doc), and reputation-track (Yahoo-resolved company and executive monitoring across non-mainland-China media and public social content, followed by low/medium/high verification and HTML email). A setup skill installs the namespaced TOML custom agents into the active project before first run.
defaultPrompt: Generate a daily news intelligence report for Japan
Create a branded briefing from daily news reports
Monitor a company for reputational risk
Set up the Sci-Research runtime in this workspace
